title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Poojara Telecom

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Store Manager at Poojara Telecom
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Store Manager with drive and ambition, Poojara Telecom in Jodhpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Poojara Telecom:
Poojara Telecom is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Poojara Telecom!
